profile.name: Yousef Ammar Abdullah
profile.title: AI Engineer & Data Scientist
profile.subtitle: Building production ML systems with Arabic NLP, Explainable AI, and privacy-preserving technologies

about: AI Engineer and Data Science undergraduate (3rd year, GPA 3.92) specializing in Arabic NLP, Explainable AI, and production ML systems. Currently holding two concurrent AI roles while conducting active research on XAI and Federated Learning. Builds deterministic, privacy-preserving ML systems deployed in production.

highlights: Built Arabic legal corpus extraction pipeline: scraped and structured 500+ Saudi law documents from Bawabah Al-Bahth, exported to JSONL with metadata for NLP evaluation
Evaluated Arabic embedding models using MTEB leaderboard — filtered 2024–2026 releases, scored by Arabic retrieval benchmarks, produced ranked shortlist for production use
Built OCR pipeline using AlOCR API with Arabic text normalization and WER/CER evaluation metrics
Developed Balsam leaderboard scraper as a FastAPI service with 1-hour cache and fallback

Built Umrah pilgrim permit extraction system (v2): PaddleOCR Arabic OCR + FastAPI service + structured field parser — extracts name, nationality, permit ID, dates from scanned permit images with warm-up model loading
Developed Arabic analytics chatbot (Mar 2026): FastMCP server bridging Cube.dev + Directus, integrated with LibreChat — enables natural-language querying of live operational data
Monitored real-time dashboards and KPIs across Hajj 2025 operations
Analyzed performance irregularities and managed satisfaction survey data under high-pressure conditions

research.title: Arabic NLP Research — Explainable AI & Federated Learning
highlights: Constructed a 100,000-sample gold-standard Arabic dataset from a large-scale public review corpus (70M+ entries)
Research goal: evaluate XAI interpretability (SHAP, LIME) and privacy-preserving Federated Learning on Arabic multi-task NLP
Simulated IID and non-IID FL environments using FedAvg; analyzed gradient drift and convergence behavior across data distributions

projects.name: Arabic Complaint Classification API
projects.description: MARBERT-based FastAPI service: sentiment, topic, and action classification on Arabic complaints
highlights: Deterministic routing engine with optional LLM explanation layer — LLM explains, never decides
Docker deployment on Railway with pytest suite and mocked model tests

projects.name: AI Family Matching System
projects.description: Privacy-preserving face similarity matching with explainable AI
highlights: Privacy-preserving face similarity: InsightFace embeddings + FAISS vector search (no raw images stored)
106-point landmark XAI: per-region similarity scores (jaw, nose, eyes) for transparent matching
FastAPI microservice + Docker, deployed as part of finalist submission

projects.name: Interpretable Cardiology Risk Model
projects.description: Integrated Classical Statistics, Bayesian inference, and XAI
highlights: Integrated Classical Statistics (Odds Ratios), Bayesian inference (PyMC), and XAI (SHAP)
Subgroup analysis by gender and age group; handled class imbalance and VIF multicollinearity

projects.name: Bella — Personal AI Agent System
projects.description: Multi-tool AI agent with persistent memory and tiered model routing
highlights: Multi-tool AI agent: FastMCP server with Notion, GitHub, Obsidian wiki, filesystem, shell, and web access
Persistent memory across sessions, tiered model routing (GPT-4.1 / Claude Sonnet), Docker Compose

projects.name: Arabic Embedding Model Evaluation
projects.description: MTEB-based evaluation pipeline to shortlist Arabic embedding models for legal NLP production use
highlights: Filtered MTEB 2024–2026 Arabic models by retrieval benchmarks; ranked candidates for production use
Automated extraction script pulling model metadata, scores, and release dates from MTEB leaderboard

projects.name: Arabic Legal Corpus Extraction
projects.description: End-to-end pipeline extracting and structuring Saudi legal documents for Arabic NLP benchmarking
highlights: Scraped and structured 500+ Saudi law documents from Bawabah Al-Bahth into a JSONL corpus with metadata
Built question generation pipeline and viewer for human annotation and NLP benchmark construction

projects.name: Umrah Pilgrim Permit Extractor
projects.description: OCR-based FastAPI service extracting structured data from Arabic Umrah permit images
highlights: PaddleOCR Arabic engine + structured field parser extracting name, nationality, permit ID, and dates
FastAPI service with warm-up model loading, CORS support, and image preprocessing via OpenCV

projects.name: NLP Learning Guide + Coffee Flavor Map
projects.description: Comparative study of Word2Vec, GloVe, FastText on specialty coffee corpus
highlights: Comparative study of Word2Vec, GloVe, FastText on a specialty coffee flavor corpus
Published interactive visualization

federated_ml: IID vs non-IID data distribution analysis
